title: Software Update - DFU - HS low battery: multiple clicks on buttons
scenario: Prevent DFU when headset battery is below 5% and ensure rapid multiple clicks on update/continue/start/OK buttons do not break the app or dialog flow.
steps: 1. Ensure the headset battery level is below 5%.
2. Attempt to initiate a DFU (Device Firmware Update) process.
3. Rapidly click multiple times on the update/continue/start buttons.
4. Rapidly click multiple times on dialog OK buttons.
5. Observe the app and dialog behavior for any crashes or flow disruptions.
expected: DFU should not be possible when the headset battery is below 5%. Rapid multiple clicks on update/continue/start buttons and dialog OK buttons should not break the app or dialog flow.
